name: elegy-plugin-authoring
description: Agent-guided Elegy plugin authoring for skill-only plugins, Rust CLI-backed plugins, marketplace wrappers, and downstream plugin repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap Elegy plugins with repo-aware patterns
interface.longDescription: Author new Elegy plugins by reading the target repository, selecting the correct plugin lane, and applying manifest, skill, runtime, wrapper, and marketplace patterns without rigid generated scaffolds.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap a new Elegy plugin for this repository.
